author: Leon Pawelzik
description: Google Docs-style comments for Markdown notes. Quote-anchored threads in a fenced block at the end of the file, so your prose stays untouched and AI assistants can read and write them too. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Tandem Comments

name: Tandem Comments

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New features & improvements

- **Automatic author name for collaborative vaults.** Comments are now signed with an author detected from your OS account, with a per-device override in settings, so shared vaults no longer need manual name entry. (#6, thanks @flhps)
- **Cleaner editing surface.** The comment block now stays pinned to the end of the file and is hidden entirely in Live Preview. Your prose stays pristine while you write; Reading View still shows the comment pill. (#10)

## Fixes

- Comment highlights now render inside tables in Live Preview. (#4, thanks @ggomez91)
- The comment block is parsed correctly even when footnote definitions sit after it. (#7)
- Commands now carry icons, so they show up in the iOS mobile toolbar. (#8, thanks @Johnathan)
- Sidebar scroll position is preserved across re-renders, no more jumping to the top. (#11, thanks @RobTheRobot64)

## Thanks

A big thank you to our first-time contributors, @ggomez91, @flhps, @Johnathan and @RobTheRobot64. Your PRs made this release.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New: copy and export comments

- **Copy button** on every sidebar comment card — copies the comment as Markdown (quoted passage as blockquote + the full thread with authors and timestamps) to the clipboard
- **Export** button in the sidebar header and a new **Export comments of active file** command — writes all of a file's comments to a companion note next to the source file, with Open / Resolved / Orphaned sections and a backlink to the source. Re-exporting overwrites the note, so it always reflects the current state.
- **New settings**:
  - *Include quote when copying* — toggle whether the quoted passage is copied along with the comment
  - *Export note name* — name template with `{{filename}}` and `{{date}}` placeholders (default: `{{filename}} – Comments`)
  - *Export scope* — all comments (default) or open only

Thanks to u/AndyKaprany on Reddit for the suggestion!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial public release.

- Quote-anchored comment threads stored in a ```tandem-comments fenced block at the end of the file — prose stays untouched
- Comment sidebar with reply, resolve, re-anchor, and delete
- Editor highlights and reading-view pills for anchored passages
- Orphan detection with fuzzy re-anchoring
- Optional Claude Code skill export so AI assistants can read and write comments
